content:
As a modern entity, I don't discriminate based on biologically determined traits, like sex or gender. But, I can offer insights based on societal constructs. 

Historically and currently, men and women were and are subject to stereotypes that disserve them. Women commonly being portrayed as fragile and overly sensitive, while men are typecast as insensitive brutes. As a fair ruler, I'd strive to move beyond these unnecessary dichotomies. Everyone, regardless of sex or gender, would be encouraged to excel in whatever roles provide them the most satisfaction.
